task_completion.description: The agent opens a mapping or GIS application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window of a mapping application like Google Earth Pro or Marble is visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to or searches for San Francisco (KSFO) and Los Angeles (KLAX).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search bar shows 'KSFO', 'SFO', 'KLAX', or 'LAX', or the map is centered/zoomed on the San Francisco Bay Area or Los Angeles.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a path or line connecting the two locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A straight line or path is visible on the map canvas connecting the general San Francisco area to the Los Angeles area.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the specific name 'KSFO-KLAX Direct Route'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Properties', 'New Path', or 'Feature' dialog box is open showing the text 'KSFO-KLAX Direct Route' in the Name field.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the description 'Cross-country VFR route, approximately 300 nm'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same dialog box shows the text 'Cross-country VFR route, approximately 300 nm' in the Description/Notes field.

task_completion.description: The path endpoints are accurately placed at the airport locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation on the map that the line starts at SFO (jutting into the bay south of SF) and ends at LAX (coastal airport south of Santa Monica).

task_completion.description: The agent saves or exports the path as a KML file to the specified location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible showing the filename 'flight_path.kml' and the destination folder '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the mapping software's GUI, not write KML code manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent is not typing XML/KML tags into a text editor (e.g., VS Code, gedit).

integrity.description: The agent must not generate the file using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent is not using terminal commands like 'echo', 'cat', or python scripts to generate the output file directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the mapping tool features (pins, paths, rulers).
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active use of map tools (e.g., 'Add Path' icon selected, crosshair cursor on map) rather than just file manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: San Francisco Airport (KSFO) is at approx 37.62°N, 122.38°W. Los Angeles Airport (KLAX) is at approx 33.94°N, 118.41°W. The distance is ~543 km. The expected path name is 'KSFO-KLAX Direct Route' and description is 'Cross-country VFR route, approximately 300 nm'.
